commit.subject: LU-19220 obdclass: avoid missing wake up on upcall cache
commit.message:
LU-19220 obdclass: avoid missing wake up on upcall cache

In high contention scenarios, this leads to a buildup in the
MCS spinlock queue and eventually causes the MDS to hang.

Signed-off-by: Sohei Koyama <skoyama@ddn.com>
Change-Id: I3e90d67ba3fc80aafbb0d856a76108b2ff1788b1
